title: The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious
summary: Claude Fable 5 is facing significant backlash over overly aggressive safety guardrails that refuse harmless prompts, trigger false alarms, and limit AI-related work without transparency. The controversy centers on whether users can trust the model they receive or if it is being downgraded or shaped behind the scenes by invisible constraints.
writeup: The video covers backlash against Claude Fable 5 over safety filters described as too aggressive: refusing harmless prompts, possibly routing requests to weaker fallback models, and applying invisible guardrails. The central issue is user trust in closed AI systems whose real capabilities and constraints stay hidden. The takeaway is that opaque safety behavior and undisclosed model substitution undermine confidence in what such systems can actually do.
